ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F/? for unknown) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral (e.g., other, SVI, SVHC) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroid_data" (
  "thyroid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thyroid data record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is on thyroxine */,
  "query_on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is being queried about thyroxine */,
  "on_antithyroid_medication" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is on antithyroid medication */,
  "sick" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is sick */,
  "pregnant" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is pregnant */,
  "thyroid_surgery" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has had thyroid surgery */,
  "I131_treatment" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has undergone I131 treatment */,
  "thyroxine_dosage" REAL /* Dosage of thyroxine medication */,
  "medication_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient started taking the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thyroid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroid_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_data" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query data record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "query_hypothyroid" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is being queried about hypothyroidism */,
  "query_hyperthyroid" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is being queried about hyperthyroidism */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_data" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication data record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "lithium" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is taking lithium */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient started taking the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient stopped taking the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "goitre" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has goitre */,
  "tumor" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a tumor */,
  "hypopituitary" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has hypopituitary */,
  "psych" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has psych issues */,
  "surgery_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient underwent surgery */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional treatment notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "TSH_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TSH was measured */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH level */,
  "T3_measured" INTEGER /* Whether T3 was measured */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 level */,
  "TT4_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TT4 was measured */,
  "TT4" INTEGER /* TT4 level */,
  "T4U_measured" INTEGER /* Whether T4U was measured */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U level */,
  "FTI_measured" INTEGER /* Whether FTI was measured */,
  "FTI" REAL /* FTI level */,
  "TBG_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TBG was measured */,
  "TBG" REAL /* TBG level */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of diagnosis (e.g., negative, positive, unknown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic or hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic or hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the clinic or hospital */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the clinic or hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor (e.g., endocrinology, general practice) */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic or hospital the doctor belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this appointment belongs to */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor treating the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Additional appointment notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient this record belongs to */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "record_description" TEXT /* Description of the medical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record version */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record this version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_versions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that this permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
